data.title: Add merge.ci_workflow_name auto-migration to onboarding SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description

Add merge.ci_workflow_name auto-migration logic to onboarding SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2b Detect and Merge with Existing Config section.

### Changes
1. When existing dso-config.conf contains merge.ci_workflow_name: auto-write value to ci.workflow_name, log deprecation notice
2. When ci.workflow_name already exists: skip migration, log that merge.ci_workflow_name can be manually removed
3. This is non-blocking (no user prompt)

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md contains merge.ci_workflow_name migration logic
  Verify: grep -q "merge.ci_workflow_name" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md && grep -q "ci.workflow_name" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains deprecation notice instruction
  Verify: grep -qi "deprecat" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
